En: DISCOVERED THE NEW AVATAR, AN AIRBENDER NAMED AANG. AND ALTHOUGH HIS AIRBENDING SKILLS ARE GREAT,
Zh: 他叫作安，是名截氣神通

En: Katara, voice-over: WATER, EARTH,
Katara, voice-over: WATER, EARTH,
FIRE, AIR...
FIRE, AIR...
LONG AGO, THE 4 NATIONS LIVED TOGETHER IN HARMONY.
Zh: 很久很久以前 這四個國家和諧相處

En: THEN, EVERYTHING CHANGED WHEN THE FIRE NATION ATTACKED.
Zh: 但當烈火國發起進攻的那刻起 一切都改變了

En: ONLY THE AVATAR, MASTER OF ALL 4 ELEMENTS, COULD STOP THEM. BUT WHEN THE WORLD NEEDED HIM MOST,
Zh: 唯有四大元素皆精通的神通王 有能力阻止他們

En: BUT WHEN THE WORLD NEEDED HIM MOST, HE VANISHED.
Zh: 但當世界最需要他的時候 他卻消失無蹤

En: 100 YEARS PASSED, AND MY BROTHER AND I DISCOVERED THE NEW AVATAR, AN AIRBENDER NAMED AANG.
Zh: 一百年過去了 我和我哥哥發現了新任神通王

En: DISCOVERED THE NEW AVATAR, AN AIRBENDER NAMED AANG. AND ALTHOUGH HIS AIRBENDING SKILLS ARE GREAT,
Zh: 他叫作安，是名截氣神通

En: AND ALTHOUGH HIS AIRBENDING SKILLS ARE GREAT, HE HAS A LOT TO LEARN BEFORE HE'S READY TO SAVE ANYONE.
Zh: 雖然他的截氣神功技藝高強

En: HE HAS A LOT TO LEARN BEFORE HE'S READY TO SAVE ANYONE. UFF!
Zh: 但要想拯救眾人 他還有很多需要學習的

En: BUT I BELIEVE AANG CAN SAVE THE WORLD.
Zh: 但我相信安必能拯救世界

En: YAY! YAY! AANG'S BACK!
I KNEW IT. YOU SIGNALED THE FIRE NAVY WITH THAT FLARE. YOU'RE LEADING THEM STRAIGHT TO US, AREN'T YOU?
Zh: 我就知道！ 你用那火光跟烈火海軍打信號！

En: YOU'RE LEADING THEM STRAIGHT TO US, AREN'T YOU? AANG DIDN'T DO ANYTHING.
Zh: 你要把他們直直引過來對不對？

En: AANG DIDN'T DO ANYTHING. IT WAS AN ACCIDENT. YEAH, WE WERE ON THE SHIP
Zh: 安什麼都沒做，只是場意外而已

En: YEAH, WE WERE ON THE SHIP AND THERE WAS THIS BOOBY TRAP AND, WELL, WE--
Zh: 對啊，我們到那艘船去，上面有詭雷

En: AND, WELL, WE-- WE BOOBIED RIGHT INTO IT. KATARA, YOU SHOULDN'T HAVE GONE ON THAT SHIP.
Zh: 然後我們就…直接一腳踩進去

En: KATARA, YOU SHOULDN'T HAVE GONE ON THAT SHIP. NOW WE COULD ALL BE IN DANGER.
Zh: 卡塔拉，妳不該去那艘船上的

En: NOW WE COULD ALL BE IN DANGER.
Zh: 現在我們可能都有危險了！

En: DON'T BLAME KATARA. I BROUGHT HER THERE. IT'S MY FAULT.
Zh: 別怪卡塔拉，是我帶她去的 都是我的錯

En: THE TRAITOR CONFESSES! WARRIORS, AWAY FROM THE ENEMY! THE FOREIGNER IS BANISHED FROM OUR VILLAGE.
Zh: 叛徒自白了！ 戰士們快離開敵人身邊！

En: THE FOREIGNER IS BANISHED FROM OUR VILLAGE. SOKKA, YOU'RE MAKING A MISTAKE.
Zh: 這個外人要被放逐出我們村子！

En: SOKKA, YOU'RE MAKING A MISTAKE. NO, I'M KEEPING MY PROMISE TO DAD.
NO, I'M KEEPING MY PROMISE TO DAD. I'M PROTECTING YOU FROM THREATS LIKE HIM. AANG IS NOT OUR ENEMY.
Zh: 不，我是在信守對爸爸的承諾 我要保護妳不受他這樣的威脅

En: AANG IS NOT OUR ENEMY. DON'T YOU SEE?
DON'T YOU SEE? AANG'S BROUGHT US SOMETHING
AANG'S BROUGHT US SOMETHING WE HAVEN'T HAD IN A LONG TIME--FUN. FUN? WE CAN'T FIGHT FIREBENDERS WITH FUN!
Zh: 安帶給我們失去已久的歡樂

En: FUN? WE CAN'T FIGHT FIREBENDERS WITH FUN! YOU SHOULD TRY IT SOMETIME.
Zh: 歡樂？我們無法用歡樂對抗振火神通

En: YOU SHOULD TRY IT SOMETIME. GET OUT OF OUR VILLAGE NOW!
Zh: 你有空最好也歡樂一下

En: GET OUT OF OUR VILLAGE NOW! GRANDMOTHER, PLEASE, DON'T LET SOKKA DO THIS.
GRANDMOTHER, PLEASE, DON'T LET SOKKA DO THIS. KATARA, YOU KNEW GOING ON THAT SHIP WAS FORBIDDEN.
Zh: 奶奶，拜託別讓蘇卡這樣做

En: KATARA, YOU KNEW GOING ON THAT SHIP WAS FORBIDDEN. SOKKA IS RIGHT.
Zh: 卡塔拉，妳知道去船上是被禁止的

En: SOKKA IS RIGHT. I THINK IT BEST IF THE AIRBENDER LEAVES.
I THINK IT BEST IF THE AIRBENDER LEAVES. FINE, THEN I'M BANISHED, TOO.
Zh: 我想那個截氣神通最好離開村子

En: FINE, THEN I'M BANISHED, TOO. COME ON, AANG, LET'S GO.
COME ON, AANG, LET'S GO. WHERE DO YOU THINK YOU'RE GOING?
WHERE DO YOU THINK YOU'RE GOING?
TO FIND A WATERBENDER. AANG IS TAKING ME TO THE NORTH POLE.
Zh: 去找截水神通，安要帶我去北極

En: I AM? GREAT! KATARA, WOULD YOU REALLY CHOOSE HIM OVER YOUR TRIBE,
KATARA, WOULD YOU REALLY CHOOSE HIM OVER YOUR TRIBE,
Zh: 卡塔拉，妳寧願選他也不選部落？

En: YOUR OWN FAMILY?
KATARA, I DON'T WANT TO COME BETWEEN YOU AND YOUR FAMILY.
Zh: 卡塔拉，我不想介入妳跟家人之間

En: SO YOU'RE LEAVING THE SOUTH POLE?
THIS IS GOOD-BYE?
THANKS FOR PENGUIN SLEDDING WITH ME. WHERE WILL YOU GO?
Zh: 謝謝妳跟我一起滑企鵝

En: WHERE WILL YOU GO? GUESS I'LL GO BACK HOME AND LOOK FOR THE AIRBENDERS.
GUESS I'LL GO BACK HOME AND LOOK FOR THE AIRBENDERS.
Zh: 大概會回家，找尋其他截氣神通

En: WOW. I HAVEN'T CLEANED MY ROOM IN 100 YEARS. NOT LOOKING FORWARD TO THAT.
Zh: 哇，我一百年沒整理房間了

En: NOT LOOKING FORWARD TO THAT.
IT WAS NICE MEETING EVERYONE. LET'S SEE YOUR BISON FLY NOW, AIRBOY.
LET'S SEE YOUR BISON FLY NOW, AIRBOY.
Zh: 讓我們見識你的蠻牛起飛，和氣男孩

En: COME ON, APPA, YOU CAN DO IT.
YIP YIP!
YEAH, I THOUGHT SO! [CRYING]
AANG, DON'T GO. I'LL MISS YOU.
I'LL MISS YOU, TOO.
COME ON, BOY.
KATARA, YOU'LL FEEL BETTER AFTER YOU-- YOU HAPPY NOW?
Zh: 卡塔拉，妳以後心情就會好轉…

En: YOU HAPPY NOW? THERE GOES MY ONE CHANCE OF BECOMING A WATERBENDER!
Zh: 妳現在開心了吧？ 我唯一成為截水神通的機會沒了

En: ALL RIGHT, READY OUR DEFENSES! THE FIRE NATION COULD BE ON OUR SHORES ANY MOMENT NOW!
THE FIRE NATION COULD BE ON OUR SHORES ANY MOMENT NOW! BUT I GOT TO--
Zh: 烈火國隨時可能會上岸

En: BUT I GOT TO-- AND NO POTTY BREAKS!
YEAH, I LIKED HER, TOO.
THE VILLAGE!
APPA, WAIT HERE!
OH, MAN!
OH, MAN.
SOKKA! GET OUT OF THE WAY!
WHERE ARE YOU HIDING HIM?
HE'D BE ABOUT THIS AGE, MASTER OF ALL ELEMENTS.
Zh: 他差不多是這年紀，精通全部元素

En: I KNOW YOU'RE HIDING HIM.
Zh: 我知道是你們窩藏了他！

En: SHOW NO FEAR!
[CHEERING]
HEY, KATARA. HEY, SOKKA. HI, AANG.
HI, AANG. THANKS FOR COMING.
LOOKING FOR ME?
YOU'RE THE AIRBENDER?
YOU'RE THE AVATAR?
AANG? NO WAY.
I'VE SPENT YEARS PREPARING FOR THIS ENCOUNTER,
Zh: 我花好幾年為這次相遇做準備

En: TRAINING, MEDITATING.
YOU'RE JUST A CHILD. WELL, YOU'RE JUST A TEENAGER.
IF I GO WITH YOU, WILL YOU PROMISE TO LEAVE EVERYONE ALONE?
Zh: 如果我跟你走 你會答應放過其他人嗎？

En: NO, AANG, DON'T DO THIS. DON'T WORRY, KATARA. IT'LL BE OK.
DON'T WORRY, KATARA. IT'LL BE OK.
TAKE CARE OF APPA FOR ME UNTIL I GET BACK.
Zh: 在我回來前幫我照顧阿霸

En: HEAD A COURSE TO THE FIRE NATION. I'M GOING HOME.
I'M GOING HOME.
WE HAVE TO GO AFTER THAT SHIP, SOKKA. AANG SAVED OUR TRIBE.
Zh: 我們得去追那艘船，蘇卡

En: AANG SAVED OUR TRIBE. NOW WE HAVE TO SAVE HIM.
NOW WE HAVE TO SAVE HIM. KATARA, I--
WHY CAN'T YOU REALIZE THAT HE'S ON OUR SIDE? IF WE DON'T HELP HIM, NO ONE WILL.
Zh: 為啥你不明白他是站我們這邊的？

En: IF WE DON'T HELP HIM, NO ONE WILL. I KNOW YOU DON'T LIKE AANG, BUT WE OWE HIM AND--
Zh: 我們不幫他就沒人會幫了

En: I KNOW YOU DON'T LIKE AANG, BUT WE OWE HIM AND-- KATARA, ARE YOU GOING TO TALK ALL DAY
Zh: 我知道你不喜歡安，但我們欠他…

En: KATARA, ARE YOU GOING TO TALK ALL DAY OR ARE YOU COMING WITH ME?
Zh: 卡塔拉妳是要講一整天 還是要跟我一起來？

En: SOKKA!
GET IN. WE'RE GOING TO SAVE YOUR BOYFRIEND. HE'S NOT MY-- WHATEVER.
Zh: 上去，我們去救妳男朋友

En: HE'S NOT MY-- WHATEVER. WHAT DO YOU TWO THINK YOU'RE DOING?
WHAT DO YOU TWO THINK YOU'RE DOING?
Zh: 你們兩個以為自己在幹嘛？

En: YOU'LL NEED THESE. YOU HAVE A LONG JOURNEY AHEAD OF YOU.
Zh: 前方還有很長的路，你們會需要這些

En: IT'S BEEN SO LONG SINCE I'VE HAD HOPE, BUT YOU BROUGHT IT BACK TO LIFE,
Zh: 我好久都沒懷抱希望了

En: BUT YOU BROUGHT IT BACK TO LIFE, MY LITTLE WATERBENDER.
Zh: 但妳讓它起死回生，我的小截水神通

En: AND YOU, MY BRAVE WARRIOR, BE NICE TO YOUR SISTER.
BE NICE TO YOUR SISTER. YEAH, OK, GRAN.
YEAH, OK, GRAN.
AANG IS THE AVATAR. HE'S THE WORLD'S ONLY CHANCE.
HE'S THE WORLD'S ONLY CHANCE. YOU BOTH FOUND HIM FOR A REASON.
Zh: 他是這世界唯一的機會 你們倆會找到他是有原因的

En: NOW YOUR DESTINIES ARE INTERTWINED WITH HIS.
Zh: 你們的命運已和他的交織在一起

En: THERE'S NO WAY WE'RE GOING TO CATCH A WARSHIP WITH A CANOE.
Zh: 我們用獨木舟是不可能追上戰艦的

En: APPA! YOU JUST LOVE TAKING ME OUT OF MY COMFORT ZONE,
YOU JUST LOVE TAKING ME OUT OF MY COMFORT ZONE, DON'T YOU?
Zh: 妳就愛把我帶出舒適圈對吧？

En: THIS STAFF WILL MAKE AN EXCELLENT GIFT FOR MY FATHER.
Zh: 這跟棍棒很適合給我父親當禮物

En: I SUPPOSE YOU WOULDN'T KNOW OF FATHERS, BEING RAISED BY MONKS. TAKE THE AVATAR TO THE PRISON HOLD
Zh: 你是被和尚養大的 我想你應該不會對父親有什麼了解

En: TAKE THE AVATAR TO THE PRISON HOLD AND TAKE THIS TO MY QUARTERS.
Zh: 帶神通王去牢房，把這個拿去我房間

En: HEY, YOU MIND TAKING THIS TO HIS QUARTERS FOR ME?
Zh: 嘿，你可以幫我把這拿去他房間吧

En: SO, I GUESS YOU'VE NEVER FOUGHT AN AIRBENDER BEFORE. I BET I CAN TAKE YOU BOTH
Zh: 我猜你們從未跟截氣神通打過吧

En: I BET I CAN TAKE YOU BOTH WITH MY HANDS TIED BEHIND MY BACK.
Zh: 我敢說我雙手綁在背後 也能一次解決你們兩個

En: Man: SILENCE.
Man: THE AVATAR HAS ESCAPED!
Sokka: GO.
FLY. SOAR.
PLEASE, APPA, WE NEED YOUR HELP. AANG NEEDS YOUR HELP. UP.
Zh: 拜託阿霸，我們需要你的幫助 安需要你的幫助

En: UP. ASCEND.
ASCEND. ELEVATE. SOKKA DOESN'T BELIEVE YOU CAN FLY,
SOKKA DOESN'T BELIEVE YOU CAN FLY, BUT I DO, APPA.
BUT I DO, APPA. COME ON, DON'T YOU WANT TO SAVE AANG?
COME ON, DON'T YOU WANT TO SAVE AANG?
WHAT WAS IT THAT KID SAID? YEE-HA?
YEE-HA? HUP-HUP? WA-HOO? UH, YIP YIP?
UH, YIP YIP? [APPA GROWLS]
Katara: YOU DID IT, SOKKA!
HE'S FLYING! HE'S FLYING! KATARA, HE'S--
I MEAN, BIG DEAL. HE'S FLYING.
Zh: 我是說，沒什麼嘛，他在飛

En: YOU HAVEN'T SEEN MY STAFF AROUND, HAVE YOU?
Zh: 你沒在附近看到我的棍棒吧？

En: THANKS, ANYWAY.
SORRY.
MY STAFF!
LOOKS LIKE I UNDERESTIMATED YOU.
WHAT IS THAT?
AANG, NO!
AANG!
DID YOU SEE WHAT HE JUST DID? NOW THAT WAS SOME WATERBENDING.
Zh: 你有看到他剛剛做的嗎？

En: NOW THAT WAS SOME WATERBENDING.
Katara: AANG, ARE YOU OK?
HEY, KATARA. HEY, SOKKA. THANKS FOR COMING.
THANKS FOR COMING. WELL, I COULDN'T LET YOU HAVE ALL THE GLORY.
WELL, I COULDN'T LET YOU HAVE ALL THE GLORY. I DROPPED MY STAFF.
Zh: 我不能讓你一個人獨攬榮耀

En: I DROPPED MY STAFF. GOT IT.
HA! THAT'S FROM THE WATER TRIBE!
HURRY UP, SOKKA! I'M JUST A GUY WITH A BOOMERANG.
I'M JUST A GUY WITH A BOOMERANG. I DIDN'T ASK FOR ALL THIS FLYING AND MAGIC.
Zh: 我只是個用迴力鏢的普通而已

En: I DIDN'T ASK FOR ALL THIS FLYING AND MAGIC.
Zh: 我又不想要這些飛來飛去跟魔法大戰

En: YIP YIP! YIP YIP!
SHOOT THEM DOWN!
GOOD NEWS FOR THE FIRE LORD. THE FIRE NATION'S GREATEST THREAT
Zh: 對烈火國王真是好消息

En: THE FIRE NATION'S GREATEST THREAT IS JUST A LITTLE KID. THAT KID, UNCLE, JUST DID THIS.
Zh: 烈火國最大的威脅只是個小孩

En: THAT KID, UNCLE, JUST DID THIS.
THAT KID, UNCLE, JUST DID THIS. I WON'T UNDERESTIMATE HIM AGAIN.
Zh: 才剛把這搞成這樣 我不會再低估他了

En: DIG THIS SHIP OUT AND FOLLOW THEM.
Katara: HOW DID YOU DO THAT WITH THE WATER? IT WAS THE MOST AMAZING THING I'VE EVER SEEN.
Zh: 你怎麼辦到的？用水那個？

En: IT WAS THE MOST AMAZING THING I'VE EVER SEEN.
Zh: 那是我看過最驚人的事了

En: I DON'T KNOW. I JUST SORT OF DID IT.
Zh: 我也不知道，莫名就用出來了

En: WHY DIDN'T YOU TELL US YOU WERE THE AVATAR?
Zh: 你為什麼不告訴我們你是神通王？

En: BECAUSE I NEVER WANTED TO BE.
Zh: 因為…我從來就不想當神通王

En: BUT, AANG, THE WORLD'S BEEN WAITING FOR THE AVATAR TO RETURN AND FINALLY PUT AN END TO THIS WAR.
Zh: 安，可是全世界都在等神通王回歸

En: AND FINALLY PUT AN END TO THIS WAR. AND HOW AM I GOING TO DO THAT?
Zh: 然後終於替這場戰爭畫上句點

En: AND HOW AM I GOING TO DO THAT?
ACCORDING TO LEGEND, YOU NEED TO FIRST MASTER WATER, THEN EARTH, THEN FIRE, RIGHT?
Zh: 據傳說所述，你要先精通截水

En: THEN EARTH, THEN FIRE, RIGHT? THAT'S WHAT THE MONKS TOLD ME.
THAT'S WHAT THE MONKS TOLD ME. WELL, IF WE GO TO THE NORTH POLE,
Zh: 和尚是這麼告訴我沒錯

En: WELL, IF WE GO TO THE NORTH POLE, YOU CAN MASTER WATERBENDING. WE COULD LEARN IT TOGETHER!
Zh: 如果我們去北極 你就能精通截水神通

En: WE COULD LEARN IT TOGETHER!
AND, SOKKA, I'M SURE YOU'LL GET TO KNOCK SOME FIREBENDER HEADS ON THE WAY.
Zh: 蘇卡，我肯定你在途中 會有機會敲到一些振火神通的頭

En: I'D LIKE THAT. I'D REALLY LIKE THAT.
Zh: 我很樂意，我真的很樂意

En: THEN WE'RE IN THIS TOGETHER. ALL RIGHT, BUT BEFORE I LEARN WATERBENDING,
ALL RIGHT, BUT BEFORE I LEARN WATERBENDING, WE HAVE SOME SERIOUS BUSINESS TO ATTEND TO
Zh: 好，在我學截水神通之前

En: HERE, HERE, AND HERE.
WHAT'S THERE?
HERE WE'LL RIDE THE HOPPING LLAMAS. THEN WAY OVER HERE WE'LL SURF ON THE BACKS OF GIANT KOI FISH.
Zh: 在這裡我們要騎跳跳駝羊

En: THEN WAY OVER HERE WE'LL SURF ON THE BACKS OF GIANT KOI FISH. THEN BACK OVER HERE WE'LL RIDE THE HOG MONKEYS.
Zh: 然後在遠方這裡，我們會騎巨大鯉魚

En: THEN BACK OVER HERE WE'LL RIDE THE HOG MONKEYS. THEY DON'T LIKE PEOPLE RIDING THEM,
Zh: 然後再回到這裡，我們會騎豬猴

En: THEY DON'T LIKE PEOPLE RIDING THEM, BUT THAT'S WHAT MAKES IT FUN!
Zh: 牠們不喜歡被騎，但就是這樣才好玩
